title: paspalum densiflorum
intro: Paspalum densiflorum, also known as thick-flowered paspalum, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and relieving fever. In herbal preparations, Paspalum densiflorum can be made into a decoction or infused in hot water to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
